02141|

02162|     const twentyFourHours = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
02163|     
02164|     const lastSwapDate = new Date(current.lastSwapTimestamp)

02166|     const isSameDay = lastSwapDate.getFullYear() === currentDate.getFullYear() &&
02167|                       lastSwapDate.getMonth() === currentDate.getMonth() &&
02168|                       lastSwapDate.getDate() === currentDate.getDate()
02169|     
02170|     let newStreak = current.currentStreak
02171|     let showStreakMessage = false
02172|     
02173|     if (current.lastSwapTimestamp === 0) {
02174|       newStreak = 1
02175|       showStreakMessage = true
02176|     } else if (isSameDay) {
02177|       newStreak = current.currentStreak
02178|       showStreakMessage = false
02179|     } else if (timeSinceLastSwap <= twentyFourHours) {
02180|       newStreak = current.currentStreak + 1
02181|       showStreakMessage = true
02182|     } else {
02183|       newStreak = 1
02184|       showStreakMessage = true
02185|     }
02186|     
02187|     const updated = {

02189|       lastSwapTimestamp: now,
02190|       totalSwaps: current.totalSwaps + 1,
02191|     }
02192|     
02193|     secureStorage.setItem(`streak_${address}`, updated)
02194|     setUserStreak(updated)
